a. 年轻的, 年幼的, 幼小的, 不老的；青春期的；代表(或象征)新趋势(或社会活动、进步党主义等)的
n. 年轻人, 青年们；[总称]仔, 崽, 雏
youngger.d: n. One who is younger; an inferior in age; a junior.

youngish.t: a. 还年轻的, 还幼小的

youngling.t:
n. 年轻人, 幼小动物, 新手
a. 年轻的, 经验不足的
youngling.d:
n. A young person; a youth; also, any animal in its early
   life.
a. Young; youthful.

youngly.t: adv. 年纪尚轻时；以适合年轻人的方式
youngly.d:
a. Like a young person or thing; young; youthful.
adv. In a young manner; in the period of youth; early in
   life.
adv. Ignorantly; weakly.

youngman.t: [人名] [英格兰人姓氏] 扬曼 Yeoman的变体

youngness.d: n. The quality or state of being young.

youngs.d:
n any immature animal
n United States film and television actress (1913-2000)
n United States civil rights leader (1921-1971)
n British physicist and Egyptologist; he revived the wave theory of light and proposed a three-component theory of color vision; he also played an important role in deciphering the hieroglyphics on the Rosetta Stone (1773-1829)
n United States jazz tenor saxophonist (1909-1959)
n English poet (1683-1765)
n United States baseball player and famous pitcher (1867-1955)
n United States religious leader of the Mormon Church after the assassination of Joseph Smith; he led the Mormon exodus from Illinois to Salt Lake City, Utah (1801-1877)
n young people collectively

youngster.t:
n. 小孩, 年轻人, 少年
[法] 儿童, 少年, 青年
youngster.d: n a young person of either sex

youngsters.t: n. 孩子( youngster的复数形式 ); 少年; 青年; 年轻人
youngsters.d: n. a young person of either sex

youngstown.t: n. 扬斯敦（美国俄亥俄州东北部城市）
youngstown.d: n. a city in northeast Ohio

younker.t: n. 青年贵族, 青年绅士, (非正式)年轻人, 小孩, 小伙子
younker.d: n a young person (especially a young man or boy)

your.d:
pron. & a. The form of the possessive case of the personal
   pronoun you.

your car radio works very well.w: Your car radio works very well
your car radio works very well.t: 你汽车上的收音机情况很好

your letter to hand.t: [经] 来信收到, 尊函收到

your other left.t: 提示对方左右的方向错了

yours.t: pron. 你的(东西), 你们的(东西)
yours.d: pron. See the Note under Your.

yours faithfully.t: （主英）[给不知姓名者的正式信件的结尾客套语]

yourself.d:
pron. An emphasized or reflexive form of the pronoun of the
   second person; -- used as a subject commonly with you; as, you yourself
   shall see it; also, alone in the predicate, either in the nominative or
   objective case; as, you have injured yourself.

youth.t:
n. 年轻, 青年时代, 青年们, 青春
[法] 青年, 青年时期, 青春时期
youth.d:
n. the time of life between childhood and maturity
n. early maturity; the state of being young or immature or inexperienced
n. an early period of development
n. the freshness and vitality characteristic of a young person

youth gang.t: [网络] 青少年帮派；青少年黑社会犯罪；青少年街头党

youth subculture.t: [网络] 青年次文化；青年亚文化；青少年次文化

youthful.t:
a. 年轻的, 青年的
[法] 青年的, 年轻的
youthful.d: s. suggestive of youth; vigorous and fresh

youthfully.t: adv. 年轻地, 无经验地；精神饱满地

youthfulness.d: n the freshness and vitality characteristic of a young person

youthhood.t: n. 青春期, 少壮期
youthhood.d:
n. The quality or state of being a youth; the period of
   youth.

youthmin.t: 桑白皮浸膏、芦丁、烟酰胺、 肌醇、维生素B2、维生素C、醋酸生育酚复合制剂(预防高血压及动脉硬化药)

youths.t: 年轻, 青年时代, 青年们, 青春
youths.d:
n a young person (especially a young man or boy)
n young people collectively
n the time of life between childhood and maturity
n early maturity; the state of being young or immature or inexperienced
n an early period of development
n the freshness and vitality characteristic of a young person

youthy.t: a. 年轻的, 少壮的

youtube.t: n. 视频网站（可以让用户免费上传、观赏、分享视频短片的热门视频共享网站）

youtuber.t: 油管人（频繁使用视频分享网站YouTube的用户，特别是自己制作视频并且出镜的人们）

yowie.t: n. <澳>野人(指据信生活在澳大利亚东南部的一种多毛人形动物)

yowing.t: (yow 的现在分词) interj. (痛苦、惊愕时)哟

yowl.t:
n. 惨叫, 号叫, 吼声
vi. 惨叫, 号叫, 怒斥
yowl.d: v. utter shrieks, as of cats

yowled.t: v. 号叫, 吼, 恸哭( yowl的过去式和过去分词 )
yowled.d:
v cry loudly, as of animals
v utter shrieks, as of cats

yowling.t: 冰啸声(冰裂时发出的声音)
yowling.d:
v cry loudly, as of animals
v utter shrieks, as of cats

yowls.t:
n. 号叫, 吼声( yowl的名词复数 )
v. 号叫, 吼, 恸哭( yowl的第三人称单数 )
yowls.d:
n a very loud utterance (like the sound of an animal)
v cry loudly, as of animals
v utter shrieks, as of cats

yoyos.t: (yoyo 的复数) n. 摇摇乐；溜溜球
